name: SHIKSHAA PUBLIC SCHOOL - PONNIAMMAN

address.Address: #8, Ponniamman Koil St, Maruthi Nagar, Hasthinapuram, Chromepet, Chennai, Tamil Nadu 600064, India

itemListElement.reviewBody: One of the worst cbse school for your child. No good experience teachers . Way of teaching is tamil only. Every year so many teachers are moved. There is no transport specialty in all area, and the transport head does not have authority over the school principal. He is very rude.

Shikshaa Public School has a good environment with appropriate infrastructure.
The teachers are very dedicated and hardworking and put in their maximum efforts.
It imparts a holistic education on cbse norms to empower every student to dream high and aim at achieving futuristic goals.

Dream Big dream high.

My daughter is studying with shikshaa public school , they are providing good coaching and extra curricular activities, teachers is having a thorough knowledge of their field, good infrastructure and amenities, teachers are more active and accessible

Good coaching is provided by well qualified staffs and well equipped lab facilities. 10th and 12th class coaching is very good when compared to nearby schools. Teachers are available online even after school hours to clear students doubt. Friendly coaching is given.

This one star is for an consideration.
One of the worst cbse school for your child.
Think before joining and never come for admission at 10th and 12th .
No free time , till 5pm school , no extra curricular .
No good experience teachers .
Way of teaching is tamil only .

Hi All

My name is Meenakshi I am happy to provide a feedback on the Tech Buddies workshop based on Artificial Intelligence (AI) that my son attended in Shiksha Public School, Hasthinapuram, Chromepet.

Iam writing this  based on my son's experience and feedback in the last five days of the workshop.

This is completely his experience written below.

Firstly, I want to commend the organizers for putting together a well-structured and engaging training session. The content was presented in a clear and concise manner, which made it easy for everyone to understand even the most complex concepts.

The training session covered a wide range of topics on AI, starting from the fundamentals of machine learning and deep learning to the latest advancements in natural language processing and computer vision. The hands-on exercises and demonstrations were especially helpful in giving us a practical understanding of how AI works.

The trainer was knowledgeable, articulate, and passionate about the subject matter. He/she had a deep understanding of the subject matter and was able to answer all our questions with ease. The trainer also encouraged active participation from the attendees, which made the session even more interactive and engaging.

The training session was well-paced, and the breaks were timed perfectly, allowing us to rest and refresh our minds with provided refreshments. The training materials, including the slides and resources provided, were of high quality and very helpful in reinforcing what we learned.

In conclusion, the best training session on AI that he attended  has  provided him with valuable information and experience. The knowledge gained from the training session has provided him with a solid foundation to build upon in his pursuit of AI skills. would definitely recommend this training session to anyone looking to enhance their AI skills.

Special thanks to Management Team and school principal for Organising such useful workshop and would definitely request and recommend to organize more workshops in future.

Thank you.
